name: 🏭 SuccessCasting Factory Automation Hub - Marketplace Backbone

parameters.content:

รับ Order/Event จาก 4 Platforms
Shopee · Lazada · TikTok · Facebook

Webhook signature ไม่ถูกต้อง

Normalize → Validate → Save → Stock Update → Notify

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ platform_order_id: $json.platform_order_id, platform: $json.platform, status: $json.status, customer: $json.customer, items: $json.items, total_amount: $json.total_amount, currency: $json.currency, created_at: $json.created_at }) }}

parameters.content:
## 🔄 STOCK SYNC ENGINE
ซิงค์สต็อกทุก 15 นาที
Shopee · Lazada · TikTok · Facebook

## 🔑 TOKEN MANAGEMENT
รีเฟรช API Token ทุก Platform
ทุกวัน 02:00 น.

parameters.jsCode:
const platforms = ['shopee','lazada','tiktok','facebook'];
return platforms.map(name => ({ json: { name, platform: name, url: `http://factory-api:5000/api/platforms/${name}/token-refresh`, body: { mode: 'managed-by-factory' } } }));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ platform: $json.platform, new_token: $json.access_token, new_refresh_token: $json.refresh_token, expires_at: $json.expires_in, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: "line", message: "=\ud83d\udd11 Token Refresh Complete\nAll platforms updated successfully\n\ud83d\udd50 {{ new Date().toISOString() }}" }) }}

parameters.content:
## 📊 REPORTING
Daily Report 09:00 · Weekly Report Mon 09:00

## 🚨 GLOBAL ERROR HANDLER
จับ Error ทุกจุดใน Workflow
Log + แจ้งเตือนผ่าน LINE

## ✅ SuccessCasting Production Backbone
- Internal API: http://factory-api:5000
- Unsigned webhooks allowed only for bootstrap via FACTORY_WEBHOOK_ALLOW_UNSIGNED=true
- Switch FACTORY_CONNECTORS_MODE=live after real marketplace credentials are configured
- LINE notifications are queued internally until LINE token credential is added
